pending.body:
finding_summary: `canonicalize_milestone_bead_ref` now treats every all-numeric dotted bead ref as a local short alias, which breaks matching when milestone IDs themselves are numeric.
severity: medium
affected_files:
- `src/contexts/milestone_record/bead_refs.rs:8-23`
- `src/adapters/fs.rs:4371-4372`
- `src/adapters/fs.rs:4997-4998`
- `src/adapters/fs.rs:5180-5183`
remediation_hint: Do not blindly prefix every numeric dotted ref. Either prove the dotted alias belongs to the current milestone (for example from the current plan/bead graph) before canonicalizing, or narrow the heuristic so fully qualified foreign numeric milestone refs are preserved.

finding_summary: The new lineage queries silently swallow every `load_plan_bundle` failure and return fallback lineage instead of surfacing unexpected plan-store errors.
severity: low
affected_files:
- `src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs:2247-2250`
- `src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs:2286-2288`
- `src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs:2352-2353`
remediation_hint: Keep the current fallback for expected stale-plan cases, but propagate unrelated `AppError`s such as filesystem/permission failures so callers can distinguish "plan unavailable/corrupt" from "the store is broken".

status_summary: running: final review restart round 9 -> Plan and Implement
